**Alin Nicolae Chița** (born 5 September 1977) is a Romanian professional [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") [manager](/wiki/Manager_(association_football) "Manager (association football)") and former player.

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alin_Chi%C8%9Ba&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Honours")]

Juventus București

* [Liga III](/wiki/Liga_III "Liga III"): [2009–10](/wiki/2009%E2%80%9310_Liga_III "2009–10 Liga III")
